priority_actions: Priority 1: Focus on suppliers from CN (4 lines using defaults)
Priority 2: Address CN code group 7206xx (2 lines using defaults)
Overall: Collect supplier emission data for 7 import lines to reduce reliance on default factors

gaps.recommended_action: Request complete emission data from supplier SUP-CN-001
gaps.data_request_template:
Data Request for CBAM Compliance

Product: Carbon steel ingots - Grade A
CN Code: 72061000
Country: CN

Required Data:
  - Direct emission intensity (tCO2e/tonne product)
  - Indirect emission intensity (tCO2e/tonne product)
  - Production installation ID (CBAM registry)
  - Verification certificate reference

Please provide:
1. Direct emissions intensity (tCO2e per tonne of product)
2. Indirect emissions intensity (tCO2e per tonne of product)
3. Production installation ID (if registered in CBAM registry)
4. Verification documentation reference
